entries.title: Commentary on Jeremiah on jeremiah 31:5
entries.excerpt: (Verse 5) You shall again plant vineyards upon the mountains of Samaria: plant, and you shall enjoy the fruits thereof. You will plant vineyards on the mountains of Samaria. Not in valleys and low places, but in the mountains of Samaria, which were possessed by foreigners after the captivity of the people of Israel, to whom it is said: Plant vineyards and harvest.
